form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last on February 23 over 400m at Maitland behind Spencer Banner beaten 6 lengths (22.83) in a Grade 5. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 100m mark shifted out came together and hampered off the back.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (23.07) at big odds over 400m at The Gardens. Has a low draw. Cannot be ruled out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (23.07) at big odds over 400m at The Gardens. Has a low draw. Cannot be ruled out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (17.93) at this track in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 3 for the first time. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a 18 length sixth over 300m at Taree Super Track. Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 1.75 lengths second but did run a brilliant 17.57 for the 324m trip. Looms as the one to beat this time.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished 6th over 300m at Taree Super Track beaten 9 lengths (17.90) behind Wild Chevy in a Grade 5 on March 4. This looks too tough.
